heading: Omitted
label: 416 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, from , , known as the Agriculture Department Appropriation Act, 1923, authorized awarding a contract for up to five years for distribution of plants, and was omitted from the Code as obsolete.act May 11, 1922, ch. 18542 Stat. 517
